key_facts:
Benefits of Bicep

 Bicep provides the following advantages:

 
 Support for all resource types and API versions : Bicep immediately supports all preview and GA versions for Azure services.

Get support

 Here are the steps for opening a support ticket for Azure Resource Manager (ARM) template related issues:

 
 Open the Azure portal .
Bicep provides concise syntax, reliable type safety, and support for reusing code.

Warning

 Microsoft Customer Support doesn't provide assistance for issues resulting from the use of Bicep experimental features ; use them at your own risk.
As soon as a resource provider introduces new resource types and API versions, you can use them in your Bicep file.
Integration with Azure services : Bicep integrates with Azure services such as Azure Policy, template specs, and Azure Blueprints.
During deployment, the Bicep CLI converts a Bicep file into a Resource Manager JSON template.
